Petition For Heirship Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared by zoom for and with Pamela Pujo by zoom.
Debbie Jones appeared by zoom for Alliance Estate Research.

Mrs. Usher stated that it appears they have identified the heirs, that there is a question about the different percentages of each of the heirs, that they have been working on selling the house, that people have been squatting in the property and that they are working on the unlawful detainer process. The court noted that the probate examiner's notes have not been addressed. The Amended Petition for Heirship Determination, etc., is continued to September 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any further filings are due two weeks prior.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An 11700 Petition
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared by zoom for and with Pamela Pujo by zoom.
Teri Popkes appeared by zoom for Alliance Estate Research.

Mrs. Usher addressed the non-appearance at the last hearing stating that someone else (Erica Carter Walden) was supposed to appear for her, but was involved in a car accident the day of the hearing. The court informed Mrs. Usher that ordinarily when counsel does not appear, it imposes $250.00 in sanctions, stated that it wants a declaration as to what happened, and that it does not take kindly to non-appearances. Said declaration it to be filed by May 3, 2023. The court also asked if a successor personal representative is being appointed in the Michael Jones' estate, and in the Susie Jones' estate. Mrs. Usher stated that their intention is that once her client is appointed in this case, they will seek to have her appointed in those other matters. Mrs. Popkes stated that she has no objections. Mrs. Usher stated that she has heard of no objections. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant. Bond will be set at $475,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for May 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney will be appointed probate referee. Status on filing of an 11700 petition to identify all issue of the decedent is set for December 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to attorney Charlene L. Usher to appear on April 19, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. The Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
